summary: Iteration 142 - Konekt Margin Delivery Notifications Pack. All 6 features tested and verified: 1) Payment queue customer/payer separation working, 2) Clickable notifications with target_url, 3) Admin orders table has exactly 7 columns (Date, Order #, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment), 4) Vendor delivery workflow (vendor stops at ready_for_pickup), 5) Sales delivery override endpoints exist, 6) Margin engine CRUD and calculation with priority working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features from konekt_margin_delivery_notifications_pack verified. Partner auth uses /api/partner-auth/login endpoint (returns access_token). Admin orders API returns {orders: [...], total, page, pages, statuses} structure. Vendor orders show statuses: Completed, Ready For Pickup, Issue Reported, Fulfilled, Pending Payment Confirmation. Vendor drawer shows 'Handed to Konekt Sales for Logistics' when order is ready_for_pickup or beyond.

F1_payment_queue_customer_payer_separati.details: Payment queue shows separate Customer and Payer columns. Example: Customer='Demo Customer', Payer='MacLean'. Drawer shows both fields separately.

F2_clickable_notifications.details: Notification bell shows dropdown with items. Notifications have target_url field. payment_approved targets /account/orders, payment_rejected targets /account/invoices.

F3_compact_admin_orders_table.details: Admin orders table has exactly 7 columns: Date, Order #, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment. Source, Sales, Vendor, Approved By moved to detail drawer.

F4_vendor_delivery_workflow.details: Vendor can set statuses: assigned, work_scheduled, in_progress, ready_for_pickup. Vendor cannot set: picked_up, in_transit, delivered, completed (returns 400).

F5_sales_delivery_override.details: POST /api/sales/delivery/{id}/update-status and GET /api/sales/delivery/{id}/logistics-status endpoints exist and work correctly.

F6_hybrid_margin_engine.details: Margin rules CRUD working. Calculate endpoint uses priority: product > group > global. Supports percentage, fixed_amount, tiered methods.
